text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: We consider the beneficiary to have an unknown type of managed care coverage if the beneficiary had 
Medicare enrollment for the month, the monthly beneficiary HMO (Medicare Advantage) indicator 
code was a value other than '0' (Not a member of an HMO) or '4' (Fee-for-service participant in case or 
disease management demonstration project) (i.e., BENE_HMO_IND_MM NOT IN ('0'
